title: Penguin
wikitext:
[]: Penguin             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 3:36 pm what's the whole purpose of that awkward penguin in NGE?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 08, 2010 3:47 pm Shinji's love interest . But seriously, just another cute animal mascot to fool you into thinking that this is going to be another light hearted giant robot series.

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 3:53 pm ...interesting, i've been watching the episodes and there was no hint at Shinji having a 'love interest' for this pengiuin

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Mon Nov 08, 2010 3:59 pm 3rd Party wrote: ...interesting, i've been watching the episodes and there was no hint at Shinji having a 'love interest' for this pengiuin

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 4:07 pm backseatjesus wrote: Shows you how deep Evangelion really is.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 08, 2010 4:09 pm Sadamoto works Pen Pen in better.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 08, 2010 4:24 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Sadamoto works Pen Pen in better.

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 7:32 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Sadamoto works Pen Pen in better.

[]:             Quote Post by Rafael » Mon Nov 08, 2010 7:46 pm 3rd Party wrote: can someone translate this for me?

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Nov 08, 2010 7:46 pm Sure thing, chief!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Nov 08, 2010 7:54 pm ಠ_ಠ

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 9:02 pm you'll have to excuse me, i'm VERY new to this scene...after watching FLCL i got HOOKED and had to find more which lead me to NGE, plus i forgot that was the name of the penguin

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Nov 08, 2010 10:43 pm 3rd Party wrote: you'll have to excuse me, i'm VERY new to this scene...

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Nov 09, 2010 8:49 am well i'm on the 18th episode

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Tue Nov 09, 2010 9:44 am Jayfive wrote: Oh boy, have you got some fun and games to come

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Nov 09, 2010 9:51 am It gets exponentially weirder. I suspect youll be back with quite a few more questions after watching EoE. Enjoy.

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Tue Nov 09, 2010 9:57 am yeah...things have been getting pretty out of hand...i was quite shocked by the Angel growing on Ikari's hand

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Tue Nov 09, 2010 10:19 am Azathoth wrote: I always get the feeling that Sadamoto designed him and showed Anno and Anno was just like, "Mhm, yeah," and went back to dropping shrooms in preparation for EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Nov 09, 2010 11:00 am 3rd Party wrote: well i'm on the 18th episode

[]:             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Wed Nov 10, 2010 12:25 pm InstrumentalityOne wrote: I advise you to watch the series first before asking such trivial questions, IMHO.
summary:
[]: Penguin             Quote Post by 3rd Party » Mon Nov 08, 2010 3:36 pm what's the whole purpose of that awkward penguin in NGE?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 08, 2010 3:47 pm Shinji's love interest . But seriously, just another cute animal mascot to fool you into thinking that this is going to be another light hearted giant robot series.

[]:  &nbs
